plugins.name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
plugins.description: 12 agent roles. User-facing (8): Launch Pad (with Phase 2.5 feasibility gate + mandatory Plan Review gate), Supervisor v4, Orchestrator, Code Reviewer (LSP, read-only), Red Team Reviewer, Product Owner (with --brainstorm ideation, Assumption Check, Reality Check), QA Strategist, QA Executor. Internal (4): Execute Manager, Context-Keeper, Worker, Plan Reviewer. v10.3 adds feasibility gates (Launch Pad Phase 2.5 GO/CAUTION/NO-GO; PO Assumption Check with user gate; PO Reality Check with Feasibility score caps) plus QA topology auto-detection (REST/GraphQL/API-only/mobile/SSO), Gate 10 for GraphQL coverage, 13-gate Strategist audit. 47 skills, 10 hooks, persistent memory, bundled MySQL MCP.
